articles.title: Where to find the best food under $20 in Malden
articles.description:
In this economy, we could all use a budget-friendly guide to area restaurants.

The post Where to find the best food under $20 in Malden appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore budget-friendly dining options in Malden, with meals under $20.
Discover 10 recommended restaurants, including local favorites like The Pita and Malden Diner.
Support local businesses while enjoying affordable meals amid rising food costs.

articles.title: Home of the Week: Medfield four-bedroom w/ADU offers a piece of Boston’s music history for $1.5m
articles.description:
Composer Charles Martin Loeffler, who worked with the Boston Symphony Orchestra, moved to this house to be a "gentleman farmer."

The post Home of the Week: Medfield four-bedroom w/ADU offers a piece of Boston’s music history for $1.5m appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Medfield home listed for $1.5 million features a four-bedroom layout and an ADU.
Home was once owned by composer Charles Martin Loeffler, linked to Boston Symphony Orchestra.
Purchase supports local real estate market and preserves Boston's musical heritage.
